$description: Per-screen handoff spec for "Select Session" (S3) in flow "pes". Generated by scripts/build-handoff.mjs — do not edit by hand.
name: Select Session
purpose: Choose the session type to book.
exit: Tap a session → S1 with session set
layout: Grouped list: Before School Care / After School Care / Vacation Care / Other
Row: name + price (left), time range (right). 'Request a space' (Other) = waitlist, no time

copy.text: BEFORE SCHOOL CARE / AFTER SCHOOL CARE / VACATION CARE / OTHER
Request a space — Billing determined by admin

behaviour: Tapping a session sets it (and its waitlist flag) and returns to S1.
a11y: Group headers are non-interactive; rows are buttons.

acceptance.text: 'Request a space' marks the booking as waitlist.
